title: DefenseClaw Hook Audit Envelope
description: Machine-readable payload stored on audit_events.structured_json for connector hook outcomes. The legacy audit details string may also carry this same object as details_json during migration.

schema.description: Stable hook envelope schema identifier. Bump only for incompatible wire changes.

connector.description: DefenseClaw connector/profile name, for example codex, claudecode, cursor, geminicli, or openhands.

event.description: Connector hook event name after DefenseClaw normalization.

result.description: Outcome of the hook collector invocation.

action.description: Normalized action returned to the connector when present.

raw_action.description: Raw hook action before mode downgrades such as observe-mode allow.

mode.description: Connector enforcement mode, commonly action or observe.

reason.description: Redacted human-readable reason for the hook decision.

would_block.description: True when the hook verdict represents a block posture, including observe mode downgrades.

body_bytes.description: Inbound request body size for malformed or rejected hook submissions.

raw_payload.description: Optional redacted raw hook payload retained only when the caller explicitly enables raw capture.

extra.description: Connector-specific string dimensions. Keys and values are log-injection sanitized before emission.

step_idx.description: 1-indexed per-turn counter within a session. Mirrors audit_events.step_idx so the structured_json sink and the SQLite column agree.

enforced.description: True when the decision was an enforced block (not an observe-mode would-block). Mirrors audit_events.enforced.

rule_pack_dir.description: Effective rule-pack directory the verdict used. Mirrors audit_events.rule_pack_dir.
